PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-22-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEL, INC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SANDY SZETO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 AT 3:30PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORSBERG, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANEL, INC $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $370.00, DEFENDANT SANDY SZETO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
